'''pakama''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:qto|qto]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-k-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:qto|qto]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| pakama
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:pækæmæth|pækæmæth]] || [[word:pækæmæj|pækæmæj]] || [[word:pækæmæsh|pækæmæsh]] || [[word:pækæmæ|pækæmæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:pakakamath|pakakamath]] || [[word:pakakamaj|pakakamaj]] || [[word:pakakamash|pakakamash]] || [[word:pakakama|pakakama]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:pakamath|pakamath]] || [[word:pakamaj|pakamaj]] || [[word:pakamash|pakamash]] || [[word:pakama|pakama]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:pakafmath|pakafmath]] || [[word:pakafmaj|pakafmaj]] || [[word:pakafmash|pakafmash]] || [[word:pakafmaf|pakafmaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:pakamatha|pakamatha]] || [[word:pakamaja|pakamaja]] || [[word:pakamasha|pakamasha]] || [[word:pakamaka|pakamaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:pakamath|pakamath]] || [[word:pakamaj|pakamaj]] || [[word:pakamash|pakamash]] || [[word:pakama|pakama]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:pakamathal|pakamathal]] || [[word:pakamajal|pakamajal]] || [[word:pakamashal|pakamashal]] || [[word:pakamakal|pakamakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:pakamathatha|pakamathatha]] || [[word:pakamajaja|pakamajaja]] || [[word:pakamashasha|pakamashasha]] || [[word:pakamaka|pakamaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:pakamathan|pakamathan]] || [[word:pakamajan|pakamajan]] || [[word:pakamashan|pakamashan]] || [[word:pakamakan|pakamakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:pakamathaoro|pakamathaoro]] || [[word:pakamajaoro|pakamajaoro]] || [[word:pakamashaoro|pakamashaoro]] || [[word:pakamakaoro|pakamakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c2e237e}}
